positive: A minimalist, abstract celestial forest scene. Silhouetted trees with luminous, crystalline leaves are rooted in a glowing nebula ground. The main subject is a central arrangement of fantastical bioluminescent flora and fauna, including stylized hummingbirds and glowing moss. Use a palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, turquoise, and ethereal gold highlights. The style is neo-art nouveau meets cosmic minimalism, utilizing high contrast between the deep space background and the bright, defined foreground silhouettes. Ensure strong, clean lines suitable for screen printing. Full body composition, highly detailed, volumetric lighting, symmetrical arrangement.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, words, low quality, artifacts, watermarks, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, cartoonish, realistic photo, logos, trademarks, messy background
